extraction.one_line_summary: BALLERINI Davide won a reduced bunch sprint after CCC paced on the climb to eliminate pure sprinters, catching three breakaway riders inside final kilometer.
tactical_patterns: CCC paced hard on late climb to string out peloton, favoring classics specialists over pure sprinters before catch.
Three-rider break caught inside final kilometer despite crosswinds suggesting peloton misjudged gap with tailwind finish assistance.
Bahrain-Merida positioned Ballerini perfectly without visible leadout work, exploiting Van Avermaet's early Olympic champion sprint initiation.

rider_signals.BALLERINI Davide: positive: Won from reduced bunch sprint after surviving CCC's climb pacing, showing classics-hybrid sprint capability
rider_signals.VAN AVERMAET Greg: negative: Initiated sprint too early despite classics experience, finished second after leading out rivals
rider_signals.LAVEAU Jeremy: negative: First rider dropped from breakaway on climb despite being Delko's representative in move
